name: Odoo
description: Route AI conversations through Odoo chatter via XML-RPC

uid.description: Odoo user ID for XML-RPC authentication

password.description: Odoo API key or password for XML-RPC

webhookSecret.description: Shared secret for verifying inbound webhooks from Odoo (Bearer token)

allowFrom.description: Odoo user IDs allowed to send messages

webhookPath.description: HTTP path the plugin registers for inbound messages from Odoo (e.g. /odoo/chatter)

botSessionId.description: Bot session ID passed in XML-RPC context (if required by some Odoo module)

routes.description: Ordered per-model routing rules. First match wins. The last entry must be a catchall (match: "*").

model.description: Odoo model name or glob (e.g. "crm.lead", "helpdesk.*", "*.lead"). Only "*" is supported as a glob metacharacter.

agentId.description: Optional agent id for inbound routing. Overrides SDK binding resolution for messages that hit this route.

reply.description: How to post the agent's reply back to Odoo.

method.description: Odoo method name to invoke via XML-RPC execute_kw.

args.description: Ordered variable names to pass as positional args after the implicit [resId]. Available: body, requestMessageId, model, resId.

kwargs.description: Keyword args for the call. String values starting with $ (e.g. "$body") are references to the variable namespace; $$ escapes a literal $. Other values (strings, numbers, booleans, arrays, objects) are passed as literals.
